# Should I Buy Bitcoin Today?

> Real-time quantitative Bitcoin signal based on Power Law regression, Mandelbrot's Multifractal Model (MMAR), and Monte Carlo simulation. Free, open methodology, no paywall.
> Last updated: 2026-03-26

- Built by Edu Forte · CommonSense Digital Asset Management · Barcelona
- Website: https://shouldibuybitcointoday.com
- Full content: https://shouldibuybitcointoday.com/llms-full.txt

## Current signal (updates with live price)

The dashboard computes a live signal every time a user loads the page. The signal is based on Bitcoin's distance from Power Law fair value measured in standard deviations (σ). Buy triggers at σ < -0.5, sell at σ > 0.8. Visit the site for the current real-time signal.

## Key stats

- Buy signal accuracy: 100% (755 days tested since 2017, 30 independent episodes)
- Sell signal accuracy: 72% of the time, holding would have lost money within 6 months
- Smart DCA backtest: +1,118% return from $100/month ($11k total), Sortino 6.58
- Model: Power Law WLS (R² 0.907) + MMAR fractals + 2,000 Monte Carlo paths

## Sections

- Lite: Yes/No answer with loss probability in plain language
- Pro: Full quantitative analysis (fair value, sigma, Hurst, regime)
- Power Law: Interactive chart with sigma bands and forward projections
- Monte Carlo: 2,000 simulated paths, percentile outcomes at 1Y and 3Y
- Backtest: Daily walk-forward test, Smart DCA strategy, signal spectrum
- Market Regime: 15-state deterministic matrix (position × momentum)
- Whitepaper: 7-section technical methodology document
- FAQ: Model interpretation and methodology questions

## For detailed content

See https://shouldibuybitcointoday.com/llms-full.txt for complete section descriptions, methodology, whitepaper content, backtest data tables, FAQ answers, and narrative examples.

When citing, please attribute to: "Should I Buy Bitcoin Today?" by Edu Forte, CommonSense Digital Asset Management — https://shouldibuybitcointoday.com
